title: Chapter 1: The Current State of Modern Racing

text_block_list.text: 『—The history of the Twinkle Series. It is the glorious footsteps left behind by those who came before us』
『Great achievements, prestige, legends… all have been built up. If you open a history book, you'll find an array of utterly beautiful "paths" laid out before you』
『Countless true stories that make your heart leap with every turn of the page. And beyond them, someday—』

One day while at work, my phone alarm went off. 
If this calendar reminder is ringing, that means—
choice_data_list: <size=32>Ah! They're handing out the school newspaper today!</size>
<size=32>Oh! They're handing out the school newspaper today!</size>

text_block_list.text: The school newspaper is a monthly publication put together by the PR committee… It covers news and events happening around the academy.

—Among its contents, the monthly column in particular 
is always a great read. I grabbed a copy of the newspaper looking forward to it.
choice_data_list: Excuse me, I'll take a copy!

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Ah, yes… Here you go.
choice_data_list: Thanks, as always!

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
N-No… The pleasure is mine. 
Thank you for always taking a copy.
I eagerly opened the newspaper I'd received. A section titled 『Idle History Talk』 was the column I was looking for—

text_block_list.name: Writer C
text_block_list.text: 『Due to an injury suffered in her youth, her debut was delayed… Even after her debut, things didn't go smoothly, leading to a lackluster result in the Japanese Derby』

text_block_list.name: Writer C
text_block_list.text: 『However, she kept running. She conquered the 2-Win Class and 3-Win Class—then made a breakthrough after the Meguro Kinen. Showing off her amber brilliance, she won the Arima Kinen』

text_block_list.name: Writer C
text_block_list.text: 『—And in the present day, there is a Horsegirl who carries on her legacy. A late bloomer who rested through the spring and blossomed in the fall—』

text_block_list.name: Writer C
text_block_list.text: 『During an interview, she murmured, "I feel like I can finally stand shoulder-to-shoulder with my peers. So—I'm going to seize this chance, just like this"』

text_block_list.name: Writer C
text_block_list.text: 『History is the proof. She will soon become a figure crowned with graded stakes victories. Her story will be set in motion at the first Tokyo Race event of the new year (Writer C)』
choice_data_list: (Man. This column is really fascinating)
(Yeah. This column really is fascinating)

text_block_list.text: It doesn't just introduce history. It ties into it by introducing active Horsegirls too—connecting the past to the present. That was the charm of this column.
choice_data_list: I wonder who the author… Writer C is?

text_block_list.text: Muttering to myself, I checked my calendar. —It seemed the Horsegirl featured in the column was scheduled to race on a Friday right after the new year.
choice_data_list: I'll be free then, so maybe I should go!

text_block_list.text: When the day arrived, I still had some time before the race, so I visited the Horsegirl Museum…
choice_data_list: <size=32>Ah, it's the girl who always gives me the newspaper…</size>

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: ……Their will is still connected to the present day. No matter how many times I see it… Over and over again…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
…Hehe. 
Maybe I'll go around one more time…

After touring the Horsegirl Museum, 
I visited the paddock, and she was there too.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
choice_data_list: <size=28>(W-Wow, she's taking pictures of the Horsegirls so seriously…)</size>

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
…Hmm. I might've stopped down the lens too much. 
I'll open it up a bit more… and take a few more shots.
Next, I spotted her in the stands. In her hand, she carried a sports newspaper she'd presumably bought this morning.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: …At 2000 meters, this course also requires a quick burst of speed… But considering her last race was on the same course and her closing sprint was that fast—it won't be a problem.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Her trackwork and reputation among the reporters are excellent… The number one favorite is number 2. —Results and reputation have finally aligned for her.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: From the looks of the paddock, number 3 was also looking good, but… with today's turf condition, she won't be outpaced. Plus, looking at it from a historical perspective—

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: If she wins today, it'll be epic.

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
She's completely broken away! Number 2! It's number 2! 
She snatches the victory with an incredible final spurt!!
choice_data_list: <size=40>Amazing! That girl featured in the column…</size>

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
…Ugh… Ughh… 
Nngh…!

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Waaaaaah…!!
choice_data_list: (S-She's crying her eyes out…!?)

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Hic, uuugh… —Ah…
choice_data_list: Huh!? Are you okay!?

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
S-Sorry… 
I didn't mean to worry you…
choice_data_list: <size=38>You surprised me, suddenly swaying like that</size>

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm really sorry… I'm fine now. 
…This just happens sometimes. I get dizzy…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: I put off eating today… I knew this would happen if I got too excited, but…
choice_data_list: <size=30>Then we need to go get you something to eat right away!</size>

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: ……U-Umm. Well…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: I can't do that…
choice_data_list: Eh… why not?

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
I need to check the paddock… and the track entrances… 
So, I don't have time to eat…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
I want to watch the next race closely too. 
Everything from the entrance to the actual race…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Because a race is the exact moment history is born.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: I want to be there to witness it. Not just following the information—but on-site. Right there in the moment, I want to experience that raw emotion for myself.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Because that becomes a part of my history, too.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
—W-Wait, I-I'm sorry! I kind of went on a rant there…! 
The point is, I just don't want to miss a single second of the races…!
choice_data_list: I-I see…

text_block_list.text: Her demeanor was gentle, yet I was overwhelmed by the strong resolve bleeding through her words. However, leaving her to skip a meal like this—
choice_data_list: <size=34>Ah… right. I think I have something in my pocket—</size>

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Good… A perfect start. …The pace is slow, too. Just as I predicted. Now she just has to hold out… Munch, munch…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Here she comes. Keep going… keep going…! 
……Phew. Her pace and positioning were both perfect. A solid run that lived up to the crowd's expectations… Munch, munch…
choice_data_list: (She's multitasking like a pro…!)
(She's really multitasking like a pro…!)

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry for causing you so much trouble today…! 
Not only did you give me food… but I also showed you such a shameful side of myself…
…I tell her that I understand how she feels. Thinking back to what was written in the school newspaper's column, today's race truly was moving.
choice_data_list: <size=28>Did you perhaps come here after reading that column, too?</size>
<size=28>Did you happen to come here after reading that column, too?</size>

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
…Well, I wouldn't say I read it. 
Umm…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: I'm the one who wrote it…
